channel.title: Machine-Learning on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Machine-Learning on Arrans github.io

item.title: ultralytics/ultralytics
item.description: NEW - YOLOv8 🚀 in PyTorch > ONNX > OpenVINO > CoreML > TFLite

item.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

item.title: tesseract-ocr/tesseract
item.description: Tesseract Open Source OCR Engine (main repository)

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is an open-source RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) engine based on deep document understanding.

item.title: roboflow/supervision
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: Avik-Jain/100-Days-Of-ML-Code
item.description: 100 Days of ML Coding

item.title: binhnguyennus/awesome-scalability
item.description: The Patterns of Scalable, Reliable, and Performant Large-Scale Systems

item.title: microsoft/onnxruntime
item.description: ONNX Runtime: cross-platform, high performance ML inferencing and training accelerator

item.title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
item.description: 12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

item.title: photoprism/photoprism
item.description: AI-Powered Photos App for the Decentralized Web 🌈💎✨

item.title: onnx/onnx
item.description: Open standard for machine learning interoperability

item.title: microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
item.description: 12 weeks, 26 lessons, 52 quizzes, classic Machine Learning for all

item.title: montanaflynn/stats
item.description: A well tested and comprehensive Golang statistics library package with no dependencies.

item.title: elixir-nx/bumblebee
item.description: Pre-trained Neural Network models in Axon (+ 🤗 Models integration)

item.title: gorgonia/gorgonia
item.description: Gorgonia is a library that helps facilitate machine learning in Go.

item.title: donnemartin/awesome-aws
item.description: A curated list of awesome Amazon Web Services (AWS) libraries, open source repos, guides, blogs, and other resources. Featuring the Fiery Meter of AWSome.

item.title: gorse-io/gorse
item.description: Gorse open source recommender system engine

item.title: yoeo/guesslang
item.description: Detect the programming language of a source code

item.title: sigstore/model-transparency
item.description: Supply chain security for ML

item.title: esimov/pigo
item.description: Fast face detection, pupil/eyes localization and facial landmark points detection library in pure Go.

item.title: microsoft/EdgeML
item.description: This repository provides code for machine learning algorithms for edge devices developed at Microsoft Research India.

item.title: mxgmn/ConvChain
item.description: Bitmap generation from a single example with convolutions and MCMC

item.title: BlinkID/blinkid-android
item.description: Everything you need to add AI-driven ID scanning into your native Android app.

item.title: louisfb01/best_AI_papers_2023
item.description: A curated list of the latest breakthroughs in AI (in 2023) by release date with a clear video explanation, link to a more in-depth article, and code.

item.title: microsoft/Windows-Machine-Learning
item.description: Samples and Tools for Windows ML.
